scope: Repair to kitchen following water escape. Includes drying, replacement cabinetry, flooring, painting and plumbing rectification.

lineItems.description: Make safe and emergency water extraction (after-hours)
Strip-out of damaged kitchen cabinetry and disposal
Structural drying — 3 days, 2 dehumidifiers + air movers
Replace 9 m² engineered timber flooring (kitchen + adjoining hall)
Replace damaged gyprock to wet wall (4 m²) and repaint
Plumbing — replace flexible hose, isolation valves, pressure test

notes: Quote assumes power and hot water are available on site. Asbestos clearance not included — if pre-1990 build, separate testing required.
